AddImageFileFromUrlRequest.description: Request body for adding an image file from a URL

compression.description: Compression of the file at the URL

file_url.description: URL to fetch the image file from

Channel.description:
Channel configuration

Channels allow organizing images into release tracks (e.g., "release", "staging", "dev"). Only available when IMGAPI is configured with channels.

default.description: Whether this is the default channel

CreateImageAction.description: Actions available via POST /images (in addition to the default create)

oneOf.description: Create image from an existing VM

Error.description: Error response from a Node.js Triton service

request_id.description: Request ID for tracing (optional, not always present)

oneOf.description: Catch-all for compression types added after this client was compiled

Image.description:
Full image manifest as returned by IMGAPI

All fields use snake_case wire format (standard for Triton internal APIs).

acl.description: Access control list (account UUIDs granted access)

generate_passwords.description: Whether to generate random passwords for users

icon.description: Whether this image has an icon

image_size.description: Image size in MB (zvol images only)

inherited_directories.description: Directories to inherit from the delegated dataset

published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the image was published (present if activated)

requirements.description: Image requirements (min RAM, networks, platform, etc.)

oneOf.description: Import an image from a remote IMGAPI (admin-only, creates workflow job)
Import an image from another datacenter (creates workflow job)
Import a Docker image (admin-only, streaming response)
Import an LXD image (admin-only, streaming response)

ImageFile.description:
Image file metadata

Represents a single file artifact associated with an image.

uncompressedDigest.description: Docker uncompressed content digest (deprecated, camelCase exception)

oneOf.description: Catch-all for OS types added after this client was compiled

max_platform.description: Maximum platform version per SDC version

min_platform.description: Minimum platform version per SDC version

oneOf.description: Catch-all for states added after this client was compiled
Catch-all for types added after this client was compiled

imgapi.description: Always true (identifies this as an IMGAPI instance)

oneOf.description: Catch-all for storage types added after this client was compiled

info.description: Triton IMGAPI - internal HTTP API for managing virtual machine images in a Triton datacenter
info.title: Triton IMGAPI

post.description: Triggers a reload of authentication keys from the configured source. Returns an empty object `{}`.

get.description: Returns the configured channels. Only available when IMGAPI is configured with channel support.
Redirects to /images for backward compatibility with DSAPI.
Redirects to /images based on URN parsing. The `arg` parameter can be a UUID or a URN.
Returns a filtered list of images.

parameters.description: Pagination marker (UUID of last image in previous page)
parameters.name: marker

post.description:
When no `action` query parameter is provided, creates an image from the manifest in the request body.

Supported actions: - (no action): Create image from manifest body - `create-from-vm`: Create image from an existing VM - `import-docker-image`: Import a Docker image (streaming, admin-only) - `import-lxd-image`: Import an LXD image (streaming, admin-only) - `import-from-datacenter`: Import from another datacenter

For streaming actions (import-docker-image, import-lxd-image), the response is newline-delimited JSON progress messages.

parameters.description: Action to perform (if omitted, creates from manifest body)
parameters.name: action

delete.description: Deletes the specified image and its files. Returns 204 No Content.

parameters.description: Force delete even if there are dependent images
parameters.name: force_all_channels

get.description: Returns the image manifest for the specified UUID. Supports ETag/conditional requests (implemented in service layer).

post.description:
This endpoint dispatches to different handlers based on the `action` query parameter. The action may also be sent in the request body.

Supported actions: - `import`: Import image manifest (admin-only) - `import-remote`: Import from remote IMGAPI (admin-only, creates job) - `import-from-datacenter`: Import from datacenter (creates job) - `import-docker-image`: Import Docker image (streaming, admin-only) - `import-lxd-image`: Import LXD image (streaming, admin-only) - `change-stor`: Change storage backend (admin-only) - `export`: Export to Manta - `activate`: Activate an unactivated image - `enable`: Enable a disabled image - `disable`: Disable an active image - `channel-add`: Add image to a channel - `update`: Update mutable image fields

Response varies by action (Image, JobResponse, ExportImageResponse, or streaming JSON).
post.summary: Update/action on an existing image (action dispatch)

post.description:
Adds or removes account UUIDs from the image's access control list. Default action is "add" if not specified.

Body is a JSON array of account UUIDs.

parameters.description: Action to perform (defaults to "add" if omitted)
parameters.name: action

post.description: Creates a copy of the image for a different account. Only available in datacenter (dc) mode.

get.description: Returns the raw binary content of the image file. Supports ETag/conditional requests.

parameters.description: Index of the file to retrieve (default: 0)
parameters.name: index

put.description: Uploads a raw binary file for the specified image. If the `source` query parameter is set, fetches the file from a remote IMGAPI instead of reading from the request body.

parameters.description: Source IMGAPI URL to fetch the file from (mutually exclusive with body upload)
parameters.name: source

post.description: Instructs IMGAPI to fetch the image file from the specified URL.
post.summary: Add an image file from a URL

delete.description: Removes the icon from the specified image. Returns the updated image.

get.description: Returns the raw binary content of the image icon.

put.description: Uploads a raw binary icon (image/*) for the specified image.

get.description: Returns workflow jobs associated with the specified image.

post.description: Pushes a Docker image to a remote registry. Returns streaming JSON progress messages.

get.description: Returns a ping response with version information. If `?error=<name>` is set, triggers an error response for testing purposes.

parameters.description: If set, triggers an error response for testing (e.g., "true")
parameters.name: error

get.description: Returns the internal state of the IMGAPI service (admin-only).

post.description: Currently only supports `?action=dropcaches` which drops all internal caches. Returns 202 Accepted. Admin-only.
